hero.locations: United Kingdom · Mallorca · Costa del Sol
hero.sub: For seventeen years we have shaped and cared for some of Britain's finest properties. Today, our craft is at home on Mallorca and the Costa del Sol.

manifesto.body: Seventeen years of British craft set our standard. The Costa del Sol and Mallorca are where we hold it: one team, from the first sketch to every Friday visit.
manifesto.imageAlt: A finished Costa del Sol stone terrace in golden-hour light

maintenance.label: Property Maintenance
maintenance.desc: Gardens, pools, stone care and repairs: one trusted team on a quiet monthly rhythm.

locations.title: Three coasts. One standard.

uk.name: United Kingdom

mallorca.name: Mallorca
mallorca.desc: Terraces, pools and Mediterranean gardens, designed and built for the island's most private estates.

costa.name: Costa del Sol
costa.desc: From Marbella through Málaga to Nerja, natural stone, water and planting shaped into gardens that last.

network.title: A group of specialists behind every project.
network.sub: We are part of a wider family of companies, each a specialist in its own craft. Together they let us build, plant and maintain to one standard.

cta.title: Your property, effortless.
cta.sub: Tell us about your estate. We will take care of the rest.

footer.blurb: British standards, Mediterranean know-how. One team for everything beyond the walls of the properties we care for.
footer.areas: United Kingdom · Mallorca · Costa del Sol

hardPage.heroTitle: Stone, shade and water. Built to last.
hardPage.heroSub: We design and build terraces, pergolas, outdoor kitchens and gardens for fine homes all around the world.
hardPage.heroAlt: Seafront stone terrace with pergolas and a pool
hardPage.introTitle: One project. One team. One standard.
hardPage.introBody: Hard landscaping is the architecture of the garden: the stone underfoot, the walls that hold the hillside, the pergola that throws the shade, the pool that cools the day. We design and build it as a single project, from the first sketch to the final detail.
hardPage.servicesTitle: Everything outdoors, built by one team.

items.title: Terraces, paths & patios
items.desc: Natural stone, porcelain and travertine, laid to outlast the seasons.
items.body: The ground plane sets the tone for everything above it. We cut, lay and finish stone with the precision of interior flooring: outdoors, where sun, salt and winter rain test every joint.

types.label: Porcelain paving
types.blurb: Large-format 20 mm porcelain gives a near-seamless, hard-wearing floor that shrugs off sun, frost and pool chemicals. We lay it dead flat on a drained base, joints tight and falls invisible.
marks: Laid level on a drained base

types.label: Natural stone
types.blurb: Travertine, marble, limestone and granite each age beautifully when they are bedded and finished properly. We cut, lay and seal every slab so the floor stays cool underfoot and level for decades.
marks: Edges and copings finished by hand

types.label: Composite & timber decking
types.blurb: Decking warms up a terrace and floats a level over uneven ground. We build the substructure to last on this coast and choose composite or hardwood to suit the pool, the sun and the upkeep you want.

items.title: Retaining walls
items.desc: Structural walls that hold a slope and turn level changes into a feature.
items.body: Sloping plots hide the best views. Engineered retaining walls tame an awkward gradient and become part of the design — clad, rendered or feature-faced to suit the house.

types.label: Natural stone & dry-stone walls
types.blurb: Stacked and clad by hand, dry-stone and stone-faced walls root a house in the Andalusian landscape. We build the structure to retain and the face to last, course by course.

types.label: Rendered & whitewashed walls
types.blurb: Smooth lime render and board-formed concrete give walls a calm, modern face. We use breathable, coast-ready finishes so the white stays bright and the surface stays sound.

types.label: Clad & feature walls
types.blurb: When a wall becomes the view, the facing does the talking. Travertine, porcelain, gabion and corten — set on a structure engineered to carry them without a crack.
marks: Substructure built to carry the load

items.title: Steps
items.desc: Flights and stairways that make every level change feel effortless.
items.body: A good stair disappears into the walk. We set risers to a constant rhythm and treads to a generous depth, then shape and light them so the garden carries you between levels.

types.label: Straight & terraced flights
types.blurb: Clean, linear flights and split-level landings give a slope a calm rhythm. We set every riser to the same height so the climb feels effortless underfoot.

types.label: Curved & radial steps
types.blurb: Sweeping, fan-shaped steps take patience and careful setting-out. We template every curve so the geometry stays crisp and the flight reads as one flowing gesture.
marks: Set out with templates, not by eye
Crisp edges that hold for years

types.label: Floating & cantilevered steps
types.blurb: Cantilevered treads that seem to float are pure engineering behind a clean face. We build the hidden structure first, then clad it so each step appears to hover.

items.title: Pergolas & shade structures
items.desc: Pergolas, canopies and awnings made for long Mediterranean afternoons.
items.body: Shade decides where life happens outdoors. Our pergolas and canopies hold their line in coastal wind and full summer sun, year after year.

types.label: Bioclimatic aluminium pergolas
types.blurb: Motorised aluminium louvres turn shade on and off with the sun, then close to shrug off a summer storm. We integrate the structure, drainage, lighting and sensors so it reads as architecture, not an add-on.

types.label: Timber & steel pergolas
types.blurb: Timber, steel and wrought iron make a pergola that belongs to the house. We size every member for coastal wind and the mature planting it will carry, with slatted screens where you want privacy.
marks: Sized for wind and mature planting

types.label: Shade sails, awnings & cane roofs
types.blurb: Sometimes shade should be light and removable. Tensioned sails, retractable awnings and cane roofs give soft cover for a season or for good, tensioned properly so nothing sags or flaps.

items.title: Outdoor kitchens & BBQ areas
items.desc: Stone-built kitchens made for real cooking and long evenings outside.
items.body: An outdoor kitchen changes how a house is used. Stone-built counters, integrated grills and honest prep space, made for real cooking rather than show.

types.label: Stone & porcelain-clad kitchens
types.blurb: A clad masonry kitchen does not warp, fade or wobble. We build in stone, porcelain and microcement, top it with marble or granite cut on site, and fit the appliances into a structure made to stay.
marks: Marble or granite worktops, cut on site

types.label: Built-in barbecues & wood-fired ovens
types.blurb: Real cooking deserves real fire. We build in charcoal barbacoas, wood-fired ovens and kamados, with the clearances, flues and prep space designed around how you actually cook.
marks: Barbacoa de obra, horno de leña, kamado
Prep and storage where you need them

types.label: Stainless-steel & modular grill islands
types.blurb: When you want a quicker route to cooking outside, a stainless modular island delivers it. Marine-grade units drop into a built island, serviceable and swappable without rebuilding the kitchen.

items.title: Garden lighting
items.desc: Light that flatters the architecture and guides every path.
items.body: After dark, a garden becomes a second stage. We light trees, water and stone discreetly: atmosphere first, fittings invisible.

types.label: Architectural & uplighting
types.blurb: Uplighting turns trees, palms and walls into the night view. We balance angle and intensity on site, after dark, so the architecture glows without a single hotspot.
marks: Angles set at night, on site
Trees, palms and façade in balance

types.label: Path, bollard & step lighting
types.blurb: Good path light sits low, warm and shielded. We light the way with bollards, in-ground spots and step lighting aimed at stone and planting, never at eyes.

types.label: Festoon, underwater & smart low-voltage systems
types.blurb: From festoon over the terrace to lights under the water, we build it on safe low-voltage systems you control from your phone. Tensioned lines, rated fittings and scenes that take the garden from dinner to midnight.
marks: Festoon and underwater rated for the coast

items.title: Fountains & water features
items.desc: The sound of water, engineered to run clean and quiet for years.
items.body: Moving water cools the air and softens the noise of the world. We build features that run clean and quiet, with upkeep designed in from the start.

types.label: Stone, marble & ceramic fountains
types.phrase: Carved stone, Macael marble, glazed tile, urns.
types.blurb: A carved fountain should murmur, not splash the paving. We work in Macael marble, carved stone, azulejo and tinajas, tuning nozzles and pump by ear and hiding the filtration where you will never see it.

types.label: Water walls & blades
types.blurb: Water walls and blades live or die on even flow. We machine the weir true, face it in corten, stone or microcement, light it from below and design access so upkeep takes minutes.
marks: Lit from within, service access designed in

types.label: Reflecting pools, rills & bubblers
types.blurb: Still water doubles your best view; a rill carries it through the garden. We build reflecting pools dead level with dark linings, and run rills and bubblers with filtration sized for stillness.
marks: Dark linings for a true mirror

items.title: Irrigation systems
items.desc: Smart watering designed around your planting and local water rules.
items.body: A garden is only as good as its watering. We design zoned, automated irrigation around your planting, and around Andalucía's water rules.

types.label: Drip & micro-spray systems
types.phrase: Drip lines in beds, planters, subsurface.
types.blurb: Borders and planters want gentle, precise water. Drip and micro-spray deliver it at soil level, plant by plant — above ground or subsurface — with the filtering and pressure control that keep emitters alive.

types.label: Pop-up sprinkler zones
types.blurb: Lawn zones are geometry. We plan pop-up head positions for true head-to-head coverage, fit commercial-grade heads flush with the lawn, then balance run times to your soil and the local water rules.

types.label: Smart controllers, sensors & water-saving
types.blurb: The controller is where the water is saved. We fit WiFi controllers, rain and soil sensors, and where it makes sense greywater and fertigation, so the garden takes only what it needs.
marks: WiFi control, rain and soil sensors

items.title: Artificial grass
items.desc: Flawless green with zero thirst, fitted to a natural finish.
items.body: Where water is precious, a perfect lawn is engineering. Premium turf on a properly built base: green in August, convincing up close.

types.label: Natural-look premium turf
types.blurb: The difference is in the details: mixed pile heights, mixed tones and a brushed-in infill. On a properly built base it reads as a perfect lawn — green in August, convincing on hands and knees.

types.label: Pool-side & pet-friendly turf
types.blurb: Around the pool and the dogs, turf has to handle splash, chlorine and paws. We use cool-touch, non-slip turf on a free-draining base that rinses clean and stays hygienic.

types.label: Putting-green, roof-terrace & sports turf
types.blurb: Putting greens, roof terraces and play areas need a tighter, lighter turf. We build true-rolling short-pile surfaces and membrane-safe, lightweight build-ups where weight and drainage matter.

items.title: Estate & driveway gates
items.desc: The first impression of the property, made to work smoothly every day.
items.body: A gate works every day of the year. We build entrances that look effortless and swing, slide and lock without complaint: timber, iron or aluminium.

types.label: Wrought-iron gates & ironwork
types.blurb: Iron should feel substantial and swing like a door. We forge gates, railings, rejería and grilles, balance every leaf, weld clean and galvanise before painting so the coast cannot get a grip.

types.label: Timber & timber-steel gates
types.blurb: A timber gate moves with the seasons; ours are built to allow it. Proper joinery — often over a hidden steel frame — breathable finishes and hardware set for decades of daily swings.

types.label: Aluminium, corten & modern metal gates
types.blurb: Modern entrances want clean lines and quiet automation. We build in aluminium, corten and laser-cut steel, on sliding or swing automation set up to run smoothly every day for years.

items.title: Fencing & privacy
items.desc: Quiet boundaries that match the architecture, not the catalogue.
items.body: Privacy should not look defensive. We build fences, walls and screens that read as part of the garden: timber slats, rendered masonry, planting that softens every line.

types.label: Slatted fencing
types.blurb: Slatted screens give privacy without building a wall. We set the spacing for your sightlines, fix invisibly and keep the lines arrow-straight over any terrain, in aluminium, timber or composite.

types.label: Walls & screens
types.blurb: A boundary wall should read as part of the garden. We build and face them in render, stone, gabion or corten, with the structure engineered first and the planting designed to soften every line.

types.label: Cane, glass & mesh screening
types.blurb: Some screens should barely register. Natural cañizo, frameless pool glass and laser-cut panels filter wind and eyes while keeping the view, fixed properly so nothing rattles on this coast.
marks: Filters wind without losing the view

hardPage.baNote: Illustrative image. Photography from our Costa del Sol projects is on its way.
hardPage.processTitle: From first walk to final stone.

steps.title: Consultation
steps.desc: We walk the site with you, listen, and understand how you live outdoors.

steps.title: Design & proposal
steps.desc: A clear design, material samples and a fixed, transparent quote.

steps.title: The build
steps.desc: Our own team builds it: a clean site, a steady schedule, no surprises.

steps.title: Handover & aftercare
steps.desc: We hand it over finished, and we stay close to keep it perfect.

hardPage.ctaSub: Tell us about your space and send a few photos. Our team comes back with ideas, materials and a clear, fixed quote.

maintenancePage.title: Property Maintenance
maintenancePage.sub: One trusted team keeping your property immaculate — whether you are there or not.
maintenancePage.introBody: A great property is never finished — it is looked after. Week after week, season after season, one team covers everything beyond your walls and reports back with photos after every visit.

categories.title: Gardens & grounds
categories.blurb: The living part of your estate, kept sharp in every season.

categories.title: Exterior cleaning
categories.blurb: Where a tired property becomes a stunning one again.

categories.title: Stone & sealing
categories.blurb: Protection and shine for the surfaces that define your home.

categories.title: Repairs & upkeep
categories.blurb: The small fixes that keep a home feeling right.

categories.title: Specialist services
categories.blurb: The extras that make ownership effortless.

maintenancePage.planTitle: Tailored to your home — by the visit, or all year round.
maintenancePage.planBody: No two properties are alike — a clifftop villa on Mallorca and a golf-side estate in Sotogrande need very different care. So we don't sell packages off a shelf. Some owners call us for a single job — a one-off tidy before guests arrive, a tree taken down, a terrace brought back to life. Others want us there all year, one familiar team quietly keeping everything beyond the walls in order. Either way, we walk your property with you, listen to how you live in it, and tailor everything to your home personally — drawing on the five disciplines above, visit by visit and season by season. The price reflects your home, never a tier; and as your property changes, what we do quietly changes with it.

planSteps.title: We visit
planSteps.desc: A walk through your property together — every terrace, every tree.

planSteps.title: We tailor
planSteps.desc: One visit or a year of care, shaped to exactly what your home needs — nothing more.

planSteps.title: We care
planSteps.desc: One familiar team and a personal price, whether for a single job or every season.

maintenancePage.ctaSub: Tell us about your property — we will shape a plan around it.

contactPage.title: Tell us about your project.
contactPage.sub: A few details are all we need to begin. Tell us where your property is and what you have in mind, and the right person from our team will come back to you personally, usually within one working day.
contactPage.talkSub: Call, email or message us directly. We answer in English and Spanish.
contactPage.responseTitle: A reply within one working day
contactPage.responseBody: Every enquiry is read by a person, not a queue. We will be in touch personally to arrange a visit or a call.
